candidates.description: The dark gray/brown featureless areas visible in multiple images (particularly images 1, 4, 5, 9) are the known Street View near-nadir stitching artifact - flat, textureless smears with no discernible pavement detail. The actual visible road surface shows worn but intact asphalt with no holes, depressions, or missing material. A manhole cover is visible in images 1 and 8 but this is drainage infrastructure, not damage.

The gray/brown blurred area visible in multiple images (particularly in the lower portion of images 1, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9) is the known Street View near-nadir stitching artifact - a textureless smear that obscures the road surface directly below the camera. Examining all other visible road surfaces shows concrete/asphalt pavement in fair condition with no potholes visible. The road appears to be concrete slab construction with visible joints but no holes or depressions with missing material.

debug_points.description: This is a residential intersection in what appears to be Panama City. The road surface is concrete (not asphalt) with typical joint lines and minor surface wear. No potholes, holes, or significant damage visible in any direction. The street is in generally good condition with normal aging patterns.

The dark gray/brown featureless areas visible in multiple images (particularly images 1, 4, 5, 9) are the known Street View near-nadir stitching artifact - flat, textureless smears with no discernible pavement detail. The actual visible road surface shows worn but intact asphalt with no holes, depressions, or missing material. A manhole cover is visible in images 1 and 8 but this is drainage infrastructure, not damage.

The gray/brown blurred area visible in multiple images (particularly in the lower portion of images 1, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9) is the known Street View near-nadir stitching artifact - a textureless smear that obscures the road surface directly below the camera. Examining all other visible road surfaces shows concrete/asphalt pavement in fair condition with no potholes visible. The road appears to be concrete slab construction with visible joints but no holes or depressions with missing material.
